---
crossrefs-hover: false
---

{{< include /assets/macros/macros.qmd >}}

# Solutions to Selected Exercises {.unnumbered}

## Chapter 1 - Argument, Validity & Proof

@exr-syllogism-translations

{{< include /content/solutions/syllogism-translations.qmd >}}

@exr-denoting-sets

{{< include /content/solutions/denoting-sets.qmd >}}

@exr-set-facts

{{< include /content/solutions/set-facts.qmd >}}

@exr-venn-diagrams

{{< include /content/solutions/venn-diagrams.qmd >}}

:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-4"}
@exr-relative-validity

{{< include /content/solutions/relative-validity.qmd >}}
:::

:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-4"}
@exr-cut-validity

{{< include /content/solutions/cut-validity.qmd >}}
:::

:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-4"}
@exr-syllogisms-validity

{{< include /content/solutions/syllogisms-validity.qmd >}}
:::
